UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information. This entity stores non-sensitive user details. IMPORTANT: Passwords are managed by Firebase Authentication and are NEVER stored here.

id.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID for the user. This is NOT a password or hash. (Primary Key)

definition.description: Stores individual user profile data. Each document's ID corresponds to the Firebase Authentication User ID (UID).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (UID).

firestore.reasoning: The structure uses the Firebase UID as the document ID for absolute authorization security. This ensures that users can only access their own data via rules like 'allow read: if request.auth.uid == userId'. Passwords are explicitly excluded as they are handled by the Firebase Auth service.
